result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Date picker open on Google Flights round-trip search. Departure date appears set to Wed, Apr 22 and return date to Fri, May 1. Search results not yet shown.
task_relevant_visible_text:
Round trip; Reset; Wed, Apr 22; Fri, May 1; April 2026; May 2026; Done; Google; Flights; Hotels; Vacation rentals; Sign in; $730
selected_candidate:
The visible Search control is not on-screen in this screenshot; the likely intended target is the date-picker confirmation flow, but the provided action was a click on Search.
constraint_evidence:
- Round-trip flight: supported (visible “Round trip” and URL context for flights)
- From Los Angeles: not_visible (origin field not visible here; only URL context implies LAX/Los Angeles)
- To Zurich: not_visible (destination field not visible here; only URL context implies Zurich)
- Departing on April 22, 2026: supported (visible “Wed, Apr 22” and April 2026 calendar with 22 selected)
- Returning on May 1, 2026: supported (visible “Fri, May 1” and May 2026 calendar with 1 selected)
- Search/submit action: not_visible (Search button not visible in screenshot; only prior action context)
action_target:
Click the Search button to submit the selected round-trip dates and search criteria.
success_signals:
After submission, flight results page loads with itineraries for Los Angeles ↔ Zurich and the chosen dates.
failure_signals:
No navigation occurs; date picker remains open; dates/origin/destination are not submitted; wrong dates or route appear in

evidence.claim: The trajectory reaches a Google Flights results page for Los Angeles to Zürich with the specified round-trip dates selected.
High-detail inspection shows the date picker had departure Wed, Apr 22 and return Fri, May 1 selected, with round-trip context visible.
The step detail notes that the visible Search control was not on-screen in that screenshot, but the final screenshot state is already the results page, indicating submission succeeded.
The run digest for step 18 shows page_type=search_results, modal=no, error_banner=no, and 'Google Flights results for Los Angeles to Zürich, Top departing flights, prices from $730'.

suggested_followups.label: Check fare details
suggested_followups.message: Open the top departing flights to inspect airline, layover, and cabin details.

suggested_followups.label: Compare dates
suggested_followups.message: See whether shifting the return date from May 1 changes the lowest fare.
